name: Kerala Backwaters Cruise
description: Discover the serene backwaters of Kerala with luxury houseboat cruises.
longDescription: Experience the tranquility of Kerala's backwaters with a luxury houseboat cruise. Enjoy traditional Kerala cuisine and witness the beauty of coconut palms and lagoons.
itinerary: [{"day":1,"title":"Arrival in Kochi","description":"Arrive at Kochi airport and transfer to your houseboat. Check-in and relax on the deck while enjoying the scenic backwater views. Evening Aarti ceremony at a nearby temple."},{"day":2,"title":"Backwater Cruise","description":"Full day backwater cruise through the lagoons and canals. Visit local villages and see coconut plantations. Enjoy traditional Kerala lunch on the houseboat."},{"day":3,"title":"Village Exploration","description":"Visit local fishing villages and learn about traditional fishing methods. Explore spice gardens and enjoy authentic Kerala cuisine."},{"day":4,"title":"Departure","description":"Checkout from houseboat and transfer to airport for your onward journey."}]
faqs: What is the best time to visit Kerala?|November to February offers the best weather|Is travel insurance included?|No but we recommend it
metaTitle: Kerala Backwaters Cruise - Luxury Houseboat Experience
metaDescription: Discover serene Kerala backwaters with luxury houseboat cruises
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 30 days before departure. 50% refund for cancellations between 15-30 days. No refund for cancellations within 15 days.
paymentPolicy: 50% advance payment required at booking. Remaining balance due 15 days before departure. Payment accepted via credit card, debit card, and bank transfer.
importantNotes: Please carry valid ID and travel documents. Minimum age requirement is 5 years. Pregnant women should consult their doctor before booking. Travel insurance is highly recommended.

name: Varanasi Spiritual Journey
description: Immerse yourself in the spiritual heart of India at Varanasi.
longDescription: Experience the sacred rituals and spiritual essence of Varanasi. Visit ancient temples and witness the evening Aarti ceremony at the Ganges River.
itinerary: [{"day":1,"title":"Arrival in Varanasi","description":"Arrive in Varanasi and check into your hotel. Evening visit to Dashashwamedh Ghat to witness the evening Aarti ceremony on the banks of the Ganges River."},{"day":2,"title":"Temple Exploration","description":"Early morning boat ride on the Ganges to see sunrise. Visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple and other ancient temples. Afternoon meditation session."},{"day":3,"title":"Departure","description":"Morning yoga session. Checkout and transfer to airport for your onward journey."}]
faqs: What is the best time to visit Varanasi?|October to March is ideal|Are there any dress codes?|Yes modest clothing required
metaTitle: Varanasi Spiritual Journey - Sacred India Experience
metaDescription: Immerse in Varanasi's spiritual essence with temple visits and Ganges Aarti
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 45 days before departure. 25% refund for cancellations between 20-45 days. No refund within 20 days.
paymentPolicy: 30% deposit required. Full payment due 20 days before departure. Payment plans available for groups.
importantNotes: Dress modestly when visiting temples. Remove shoes before entering sacred spaces. Photography restrictions apply in some temples. Respect local customs and traditions.

longDescription: Discover the architectural marvel of Taj Mahal and explore the historical wonders of Agra including Agra Fort and Fatehpur Sikri.
